title: Cisco’s tiny open-weight AI hunts bugs, and it says it beats Gemini and GPT
summary: Cisco’s new Antares models are small enough to run on your own machines. Cisco’s Foundation AI team has released two open-weight security models, Antares-350M and Antares-1B, built to find known vulnerabilities buried in existing codebases.
